rationale: This is a near-total mismatch: the pastel pink/red 3D kitchen organization aesthetic clashes hard with TheSphinx's mystical dark/gold minimalism, and pouring-into-jars ASMR has zero connection to a deductive Q&A guessing loop with voice input. The satisfaction/organization archetype skews toward casual female sim/declutter audiences (TikTok-driven impulse installs), not the educated 25-45 trivia crowd we're targeting. Do not adapt — pursue mystery-reveal, "can the AI guess who you're thinking of?" hook formats instead.
